015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.response;
018
019/**
020 * Represents an <c>HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity</c> error response.
021 *
022 * <p>
023 * The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors.
024 *
025 * <p>
026 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
027 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
028 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
029 * (and possibly earlier).
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
033 * </ul>
034 *
035 * @since 9.2.1
036 */
037public class UnprocessableEntity extends BasicHttpException {
038
039   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
040
041   /** HTTP status code */
042   public static final int STATUS_CODE = 422;
043
044   /** Reason phrase */
045   public static final String REASON_PHRASE = "Unprocessable Entity";
046
047   /**
048    * Constructor with no message.
049    */
050   public UnprocessableEntity() {
051      super(STATUS_CODE, REASON_PHRASE);
052   }
053
054   /**
055    * Constructor with a {@link java.text.MessageFormat}- or {@link String#format(String, Object...) String.format}-style message.
056    *
057    * @param msg The detail message. May be <jk>null</jk>.
058    *    Treated as a format pattern when {@code args} is non-empty. Supports both {@link java.text.MessageFormat} ({@code {0}}) and {@link String#format(String, Object...) String.format} ({@code %s}) placeholders.
059    * @param args Optional message arguments.
060    */
061   public UnprocessableEntity(String msg, Object...args) {
062      super(STATUS_CODE, REASON_PHRASE, msg, args);
063   }
064
065   /**
066    * Constructor with a cause.
067    *
068    * @param cause The cause. May be <jk>null</jk>.
069    */
070   public UnprocessableEntity(Throwable cause) {
071      super(STATUS_CODE, REASON_PHRASE, cause, cause != null ? cause.getMessage() : null);
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Constructor with a cause and a {@link java.text.MessageFormat}- or {@link String#format(String, Object...) String.format}-style message.
076    *
077    * @param cause The cause. May be <jk>null</jk>.
078    * @param msg The detail message. May be <jk>null</jk>.
079    *    Treated as a format pattern when {@code args} is non-empty. Supports both {@link java.text.MessageFormat} ({@code {0}}) and {@link String#format(String, Object...) String.format} ({@code %s}) placeholders.
080    * @param args Optional message arguments.
081    */
082   public UnprocessableEntity(Throwable cause, String msg, Object...args) {
083      super(STATUS_CODE, REASON_PHRASE, cause, msg, args);
084   }
085
086   /**
087    * Copy constructor.
088    *
089    * @param copyFrom The instance to copy. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
090    */
091   public UnprocessableEntity(UnprocessableEntity copyFrom) {
092      super(copyFrom);
093   }
094}
